message:
🐛 Fix CORS: add X-Requested-With to all kc-agent preflight headers (#10090)

Several kc-agent endpoints only allowed Authorization or Content-Type
in Access-Control-Allow-Headers, causing browsers to block requests
that include the X-Requested-With header. This broke /settings,
/clusters, /gpu-nodes, and /auto-update/trigger from the frontend.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
